common_issues: P0: Internal link duplicates - every article has duplicate internal links in body text (some links appear 3-4x)
P1: Word count as measured by space-splitting shows 200-300 tokens, but this is misleading for Japanese. Actual character counts are 6428-8133 chars, which is appropriate content length.
Note: content optimization script word_count metric uses regex [A-Za-z0-9]+ which undercounts Japanese text. A CJK-aware character count should be used instead.

summary: Japanese site (ja) passes all 17 visual QA checks. content optimization QA: all 12 articles have correct E-E-A-T (3 matches each using Japanese patterns like 私たちのテストでは/検証/実際に), FAQ with よくある質問 and 5 questions, 6-8 unique internal links, no banned words, titles ≤60 chars, meta 120-140 chars. Key issues: (1) P0: Every article has internal link duplicates in body text (some links appear 3-4x). (2) content optimization script word_count metric is CJK-unaware - shows 200-300 space-separated tokens but actual character counts are 6428-8133, which is appropriate for Japanese articles. (3) All visual checks pass: lang=ja, 15 hreflangs, 14 language switcher options, 8 community cards, 12 resource cards, 3 related articles, localized APK CTA, no overflow, no empty href, no console.log.
